prompt: Tap cutoff seat before depth-synthesis checkpoint action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before stack-depth decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Cutoff is the seat anchor because this depth read starts from the earlier late-position range before the button takes over.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The cutoff anchor comes before the button here because this depth read is measuring the earlier late-position range. That anchor tells you whose leverage is actually being tested before the final action.
